_description: ML-DSA-65 (FIPS 204) Known Answer Test configuration. Since ML-DSA-65 signing is randomized, KAT compliance is verified through property-based testing: keygen produces correct sizes, sign+verify round-trips, wrong-key rejection, and cross-SDK verification of shared signatures.

property_tests.name: keygen_sizes
property_tests.description: Generated public key must be exactly 1952 bytes, signature must be exactly 3309 bytes

property_tests.name: sign_verify_roundtrip
property_tests.description: Sign then verify with same key must succeed

property_tests.name: wrong_key_rejection
property_tests.description: Sign with key A, verify with key B must fail

property_tests.name: wrong_message_rejection
property_tests.description: Sign message A, verify against message B must fail

property_tests.name: deterministic_kid
property_tests.description: kid = hex(SHA-256(alg || 0x00 || pubkey))[0:32] must be deterministic and reproducible

property_tests.name: cross_sdk_verify
property_tests.description: Signature from TypeScript SDK (in interop_vectors.json) must verify in this SDK
